extraction.one_line_summary: GILBERT Philippe attacked with TRENTIN and BOONEN on approach to Taaienberg, teammates covered move, then SAGAN crashed attacking Paterberg with 10km remaining, GILBERT soloed to victory
tactical_patterns: BOONEN mechanical before Taaienberg forced Quick-Step to convert three-rider presence into GILBERT solo rather than numerical advantage
SAGAN delayed decisive move until final Paterberg, too late as GILBERT already clear from earlier selection
Quick-Step planted three riders (GILBERT, TRENTIN, BOONEN) in dangerous move before key climb, overwhelming coverage tactics

rider_signals.GILBERT Philippe: positive: First Belgian winner since 2012, first from his region in 30 years, converted teammate numerical advantage into solo after BOONEN mechanical
rider_signals.BOONEN Tom: negative: Chain jam mechanical before Taaienberg destroyed Quick-Step's three-rider numerical advantage at decisive moment on his final Ronde
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: Waited until final Paterberg (last climb) to attack from chase position, crashed taking VANMARCKE and ending own race
rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: neutral: Present in BOONEN acceleration but couldn't follow when Quick-Step intensified on key climb
rider_signals.VANMARCKE Sep: negative: Caught in SAGAN crash on Paterberg while in chase position with podium possible
